content.summary: A Cashier is responsible for handling customer transactions, ensuring accurate payment processing, and delivering excellent customer service in retail, F&B, and service-based environments.
content.shortIntro: Looking to hire a reliable Cashier in Malaysia? This job description template is designed to help employers, HR teams, and recruiters attract candidates who can handle transactions efficiently while delivering great customer service.
content.description:
We are looking for a reliable and customer-friendly Cashier to join our team. As a Cashier, you will be responsible for handling transactions efficiently, providing excellent customer service, and ensuring a smooth checkout experience. This role is ideal for individuals who enjoy interacting with people and have strong attention to detail.

You will play a key role in maintaining customer satisfaction by accurately processing payments, issuing receipts, and resolving basic inquiries. In addition, you will support daily store operations such as maintaining cleanliness at the checkout area and assisting with product displays when needed.

This position is suitable for entry-level candidates or those with prior retail experience. Training will be provided to ensure you understand company procedures and systems. If you are trustworthy, organized, and enjoy working in a fast-paced retail environment, we encourage you to apply.

sections.heading: What is a Cashier?
sections.content:
A Cashier is a frontline employee responsible for processing customer purchases by handling payments, issuing receipts, and ensuring a smooth checkout process. They work in various industries such as retail, supermarkets, convenience stores, and food & beverage outlets.

In Malaysia, Cashiers are expected to be familiar with multiple payment methods including cash, debit/credit cards, QR payments, and e-wallets such as Touch ‘n Go, GrabPay, and Boost. Their role goes beyond transactions—they also contribute to customer satisfaction by providing friendly and efficient service.

Additionally, Cashiers may assist with basic store operations such as answering customer questions, handling returns, and maintaining cleanliness at the checkout counter.

sections.heading: Cashier Responsibilities
sections.content:
Cashiers play a critical role in ensuring smooth business operations by handling transactions accurately and efficiently. They are responsible for maintaining financial accuracy while delivering a positive customer experience.

Their responsibilities also include supporting store operations, ensuring pricing accuracy, and maintaining a professional and friendly attitude during customer interactions. A good Cashier can help reduce errors, speed up checkout times, and improve overall customer satisfaction.

sections.heading: Job Brief
sections.content:
We are looking for a trustworthy and customer-focused Cashier to manage transactions efficiently and accurately. The ideal candidate should be detail-oriented, reliable, and able to work in a fast-paced environment.

As a Cashier, you will be responsible for handling payments, assisting customers, and ensuring a smooth checkout experience. You should also be comfortable using POS systems and handling different payment methods.

This role is ideal for individuals who enjoy interacting with customers and are looking to build a career in retail or the service industry.

responsibilities: Process customer purchases quickly and accurately using POS systems
Handle cash, credit/debit cards, and e-wallet payments
Issue receipts, refunds, and change correctly
Ensure all transactions are recorded properly
Maintain cleanliness and organization at the checkout counter
Greet customers and provide friendly, professional service
Assist customers with inquiries, pricing, or product locations
Resolve basic complaints or escalate issues when necessary
Balance cash register at the start and end of shifts
Support stock replenishment and store operations when required
Follow company policies, SOPs, and security procedures
requirements: Minimum SPM or equivalent qualification
Basic math and cash handling skills
Familiarity with POS systems or willingness to learn
Good communication and interpersonal skills
Strong attention to detail and accuracy
Customer service-oriented with a positive attitude
Ability to work in a fast-paced environment
Honest, reliable, and responsible
Willing to work shifts, weekends, and public holidays
Previous experience in retail or F&B is an advantage but not mandatory

faqs.question: What does a Cashier do?
faqs.answer: A Cashier handles customer transactions, processes payments, issues receipts, and ensures a smooth and efficient checkout experience. They also assist customers with basic inquiries and maintain accuracy in all transactions.

faqs.question: What skills are required for a Cashier?
faqs.answer: Key skills include basic math skills, attention to detail, communication skills, and the ability to provide good customer service. Familiarity with POS systems and handling digital payments is also beneficial in Malaysia.

faqs.question: Is experience required for a Cashier job?
faqs.answer: Not always. Many employers in Malaysia hire entry-level candidates and provide on-the-job training. However, prior experience in retail or F&B can be an added advantage.

faqs.question: What industries hire Cashiers in Malaysia?
faqs.answer: Cashiers are commonly hired in retail stores, supermarkets, convenience stores (such as 7-Eleven), restaurants, cafes, and shopping malls. They are essential in any business that handles customer transactions.

faqs.question: How much does a Cashier earn in Malaysia?
faqs.answer: The average salary for a Cashier in Malaysia typically ranges from RM1,500 to RM2,500 per month, depending on location, industry, and experience. Some employers may also offer overtime pay, allowances, or incentives.

faqs.question: What makes a good Cashier?
faqs.answer: A good Cashier is accurate, friendly, and efficient. They can handle transactions quickly without errors, communicate well with customers, and remain calm under pressure during peak hours.

content.summary: A Sales Assistant supports store operations by assisting customers, promoting products, and helping achieve sales targets while ensuring a positive shopping experience.
content.shortIntro: Sales Assistants are essential in retail environments, acting as the first point of contact for customers. They help drive sales by providing product knowledge, assisting with purchases, and maintaining store presentation.
content.description:
We are looking for a motivated and customer-oriented Sales Assistant to join our team. As a Sales Assistant, you will play an important role in supporting daily store operations while delivering excellent customer service. You will assist customers in finding products, provide recommendations, and ensure a pleasant shopping experience.

This role requires strong communication skills, a positive attitude, and the ability to work in a fast-paced retail environment. You will also be responsible for maintaining store cleanliness, organizing merchandise, and supporting sales targets set by the management.

Whether you are starting your career or have previous retail experience, this role offers a great opportunity to develop your customer service and sales skills. Training will be provided to help you understand the products, sales techniques, and store processes.

If you enjoy interacting with customers, have a passion for sales, and are eager to grow in the retail industry, we encourage you to apply.

sections.heading: What is a Sales Assistant?
sections.content: A Sales Assistant is a retail professional responsible for assisting customers, managing product displays, and supporting sales activities. They play a key role in ensuring customers have a smooth and enjoyable shopping experience while contributing to the store’s overall performance.

sections.heading: Sales Assistant Responsibilities
sections.content: Sales Assistants handle both customer service and operational tasks to support daily store activities. They ensure products are well-presented and customers receive the assistance they need.

sections.heading: Job Brief
sections.content: We are looking for an enthusiastic Sales Assistant to help customers identify and purchase products they need. The ideal candidate will have strong communication skills, a passion for sales, and the ability to work in a team environment.

responsibilities: Greet and assist customers in a friendly and professional manner
Recommend products based on customer needs
Maintain store cleanliness and product displays
Replenish stock and organize merchandise
Support promotional activities and sales campaigns
Handle customer inquiries and complaints effectively
Assist with inventory checks and stock control
requirements: Minimum SPM qualification or equivalent
Strong communication and interpersonal skills
Customer-focused with a positive attitude
Ability to work flexible hours including weekends
Basic knowledge of sales techniques and retail operations
Team player with good problem-solving skills
Experience in retail or customer service is an added advantage

faqs.question: What does a Sales Assistant do?
faqs.answer: A Sales Assistant helps customers find products, provides recommendations, and supports store operations.

faqs.question: Is experience required for this role?
faqs.answer: Not always. Many employers in Malaysia hire entry-level candidates and provide training.

faqs.question: What skills are important for a Sales Assistant?
faqs.answer: Communication skills, customer service, teamwork, and basic sales knowledge are important.

faqs.question: Where do Sales Assistants usually work?
faqs.answer: They commonly work in retail stores, shopping malls, supermarkets, and boutiques.

content.summary: An Admin professional provides essential support to office operations, ensuring efficiency and organization within the workplace.
content.shortIntro: Looking for an Admin in Malaysia? This template covers the key responsibilities and requirements to help you find the right candidate for your office support needs.
content.description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented and organized Admin to support our daily office operations. As an Admin, you will play a key role in ensuring the smooth running of administrative tasks, including managing documents, handling communications, and coordinating internal processes.

This role requires strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to multitask in a fast-paced environment. You will assist different departments by maintaining records, scheduling meetings, and supporting basic HR or finance-related tasks when needed.

The ideal candidate is proactive, reliable, and able to work independently while being a supportive team member. You should have good communication skills and be comfortable using office software and equipment.

sections.heading: What is an Admin?
sections.content: An Admin is a professional who handles various office support tasks to ensure the smooth operation of a business. Their role involves managing paperwork, answering calls, scheduling appointments, and assisting other team members with administrative needs.

responsibilities: Manage and organize office documents and records
Handle incoming calls, emails, and correspondence
Schedule meetings and coordinate office calendars
Assist in the preparation of reports and presentations
Maintain office supplies and equipment
Support HR and finance tasks as required
Greet and assist visitors in a professional manner
requirements: Minimum SPM or equivalent; Diploma in Business Admin is a plus
Proven experience in an administrative role
Proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
Excellent organizational and time-management skills
Strong verbal and written communication skills
Attention to detail and problem-solving abilities
Ability to work independently and as part of a team

faqs.question: What does an Admin do?
faqs.answer: An Admin handles daily office tasks such as document management, communication, and scheduling to support business operations.

faqs.question: What skills are needed for an Admin?
faqs.answer: Key skills include organization, communication, proficiency in office software, and attention to detail.

content.summary: A Procurement Officer is responsible for sourcing suppliers, purchasing goods and services, and ensuring cost-effective and timely procurement to support business operations.
content.shortIntro: Procurement Officers play a key role in managing company spending and supplier relationships. They ensure that businesses obtain quality goods and services at the best possible price while maintaining efficiency in the supply chain.
content.description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented and strategic Procurement Officer to manage the purchasing activities of our organization. As a Procurement Officer, you will be responsible for sourcing suppliers, negotiating contracts, and ensuring the timely delivery of goods and services at competitive prices.

This role plays a critical part in controlling costs and maintaining the quality of products and services required for business operations. You will work closely with internal departments to understand purchasing needs and ensure procurement processes align with company policies.

The ideal candidate should have strong negotiation skills, analytical thinking, and the ability to build good relationships with vendors. Experience in procurement, supply chain, or purchasing will be an advantage.

If you are organized, cost-conscious, and capable of managing supplier relationships effectively, this is a great opportunity to grow your career in procurement and supply chain management.

sections.heading: What is a Procurement Officer?
sections.content: A Procurement Officer, also known as a Purchasing Officer, manages the process of acquiring goods and services for an organization. They evaluate suppliers, negotiate contracts, and ensure procurement activities align with company goals and budgets.

sections.heading: Procurement Officer Responsibilities
sections.content: Procurement Officers handle purchasing activities and supplier management to ensure business operations run smoothly. They are responsible for maintaining cost efficiency and product quality.

sections.heading: Job Brief
sections.content: We are seeking a reliable Procurement Officer to manage purchasing processes, negotiate with suppliers, and ensure timely delivery of goods and services. The ideal candidate should be detail-oriented and possess strong negotiation skills.

responsibilities: Identify and evaluate potential suppliers
Negotiate pricing, contracts, and delivery terms
Issue purchase orders and monitor order status
Ensure timely delivery and quality of goods
Maintain procurement records and documentation
Coordinate with internal departments on purchasing needs
Monitor inventory levels and avoid shortages or overstock
requirements: Diploma or Degree in Business, Supply Chain, or related field
Strong negotiation and vendor management skills
Analytical thinking and cost management ability
Proficiency in Microsoft Excel or procurement software
Good communication and interpersonal skills
Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines
Experience in procurement or purchasing is an added advantage

faqs.question: What does a Procurement Officer do?
faqs.answer: A Procurement Officer manages purchasing activities, negotiates with suppliers, and ensures cost-effective procurement.

faqs.question: Is procurement a good career in Malaysia?
faqs.answer: Yes, procurement roles are in demand across industries such as manufacturing, retail, and logistics.

faqs.question: What skills are important for procurement roles?
faqs.answer: Negotiation, analytical skills, communication, and attention to detail are essential.

faqs.question: What industries hire Procurement Officers?
faqs.answer: Manufacturing, construction, retail, FMCG, and logistics sectors commonly hire for this role.

content.summary: A Sales Executive is responsible for driving revenue by identifying sales opportunities, building client relationships, and closing deals to achieve business targets.
content.shortIntro: Sales Executives play a crucial role in business growth by connecting products or services with customers. They focus on generating revenue, maintaining client relationships, and contributing to overall company success.
content.description:
We are looking for a driven and results-oriented Sales Executive to join our team. As a Sales Executive, you will be responsible for generating leads, building client relationships, and achieving sales targets. This role is ideal for individuals who are passionate about sales and enjoy working in a fast-paced, target-driven environment.

You will be required to identify new business opportunities, present products or services to potential clients, and maintain strong relationships with existing customers. Your ability to communicate effectively and understand customer needs will be key to your success in this role.

The ideal candidate should be proactive, confident, and goal-oriented. Whether you have prior sales experience or are eager to start your career in sales, this role offers great earning potential and career growth opportunities.

If you are motivated, persuasive, and eager to grow in the sales field, we encourage you to apply and be part of our team.

sections.heading: What is a Sales Executive?
sections.content: A Sales Executive is a professional responsible for selling products or services to customers. They identify potential clients, present offerings, negotiate deals, and maintain long-term relationships to ensure repeat business.

sections.heading: Sales Executive Responsibilities
sections.content: Sales Executives manage the full sales cycle, from prospecting and pitching to closing deals and maintaining client relationships. They are key contributors to a company’s revenue growth.

sections.heading: Job Brief
sections.content: We are seeking a motivated Sales Executive to drive sales and build strong customer relationships. The ideal candidate should be confident, persuasive, and capable of meeting or exceeding sales targets.

responsibilities: Generate leads and identify new business opportunities
Conduct sales presentations and product demonstrations
Build and maintain relationships with new and existing clients
Negotiate pricing and close sales deals
Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
Prepare sales reports and maintain customer records
Provide excellent after-sales service and support
requirements: Diploma or Degree in Business, Marketing, or related field
Strong communication, negotiation, and persuasion skills
Results-driven with a strong sales mindset
Ability to work independently and handle pressure
Good problem-solving and relationship management skills
Willingness to travel or meet clients
Experience in sales is preferred but not mandatory

faqs.question: What does a Sales Executive do?
faqs.answer: A Sales Executive generates leads, sells products or services, and builds relationships with clients to drive revenue.

faqs.question: Is this role suitable for fresh graduates?
faqs.answer: Yes, many companies in Malaysia hire fresh graduates and provide training in sales techniques.

faqs.question: What skills are important for a Sales Executive?
faqs.answer: Communication, negotiation, confidence, and target achievement are key skills.

faqs.question: What industries hire Sales Executives?
faqs.answer: Almost all industries, including retail, FMCG, technology, finance, and real estate.

content.summary: An Admin Assistant provides administrative and clerical support to ensure efficient office operations and smooth coordination across departments.
content.shortIntro: Admin Assistants are essential to keeping an office running efficiently. They handle daily administrative tasks, support teams, and ensure that communication and documentation are well-organized.
content.description:
We are looking for a proactive and well-organized Admin Assistant to support our daily office operations. As an Admin Assistant, you will be responsible for handling administrative tasks, maintaining records, and ensuring smooth coordination across departments.

This role requires strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to multitask effectively. You will assist with scheduling meetings, managing documents, handling correspondence, and supporting basic operational tasks. Your contribution will help improve overall efficiency and productivity within the organization.

The ideal candidate should be reliable, detail-oriented, and capable of working both independently and as part of a team. Whether you are a fresh graduate or have prior administrative experience, this role offers a great opportunity to develop essential office and coordination skills.

If you are someone who enjoys organizing, supporting teams, and working in a structured environment, we encourage you to apply.

sections.heading: Admin Assistant Responsibilities

Schedule meetings and coordinate appointments
Prepare reports, letters, and presentations
Perform data entry and maintain databases
Assist with HR, payroll, or finance-related tasks
Ensure office supplies are stocked and organized

Good written and verbal communication abilities
Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools
Attention to detail and ability to meet deadlines

faqs.question: What does an Admin Assistant do?
faqs.answer: An Admin Assistant supports office operations by handling administrative tasks, managing documents, and coordinating schedules.

faqs.question: Is this role suitable for fresh graduates?
faqs.answer: Yes, many companies in Malaysia hire entry-level candidates and provide on-the-job training.

faqs.question: What skills are important for an Admin Assistant?
faqs.answer: Organization, communication, multitasking, and attention to detail are key skills.

faqs.question: Which departments does an Admin Assistant support?
faqs.answer: They may support HR, finance, operations, or management depending on company needs.

content.summary: A Supervisor oversees daily operations, manages team performance, and ensures tasks are completed efficiently while maintaining company standards.
content.shortIntro: Supervisors play an important role in bridging management and employees. They ensure teams are productive, motivated, and aligned with company goals.
content.description:
We are looking for a responsible and experienced Supervisor to oversee daily operations and lead our team effectively. As a Supervisor, you will play a key role in ensuring tasks are completed efficiently, team members are supported, and company standards are maintained.

This role involves managing staff performance, assigning duties, and ensuring smooth workflow across operations. You will act as the bridge between management and employees, helping to communicate expectations, resolve issues, and improve productivity.

The ideal candidate should have strong leadership skills, good communication abilities, and the confidence to manage a team in a fast-paced environment. You should be able to motivate staff, handle challenges, and ensure operational targets are met.

Whether in retail, F&B, or office settings, this role offers an opportunity to grow into higher management positions. If you are organized, proactive, and capable of leading a team, we encourage you to apply.

sections.heading: What is a Supervisor?
sections.content: A Supervisor is a team leader responsible for overseeing the work of employees, assigning tasks, and ensuring operational efficiency. They are commonly found in industries such as retail, F&B, manufacturing, and office environments.

sections.heading: Supervisor Responsibilities
sections.content: Supervisors manage day-to-day activities, support team members, and ensure work is completed according to company standards and targets.

sections.heading: Job Brief
sections.content: We are seeking a dedicated Supervisor to oversee operations and manage staff performance. The ideal candidate should have leadership experience and the ability to guide teams effectively.

responsibilities: Supervise and coordinate daily team activities
Assign tasks and monitor staff performance
Train and mentor team members
Ensure compliance with company policies
Handle customer complaints and resolve issues
Monitor productivity and achieve operational targets
Prepare reports and communicate with management
requirements: Diploma or relevant qualification preferred
Proven experience in a supervisory role
Strong leadership and team management skills
Good communication and interpersonal abilities
Problem-solving and decision-making skills
Ability to work in a fast-paced environment
Flexible working hours depending on industry

faqs.question: What does a Supervisor do?
faqs.answer: A Supervisor manages a team, oversees daily operations, and ensures work is completed efficiently.

faqs.question: Is experience required for a Supervisor role?
faqs.answer: Yes, most employers in Malaysia prefer candidates with prior experience in leadership or team management.

faqs.question: What skills are important for a Supervisor?
faqs.answer: Leadership, communication, problem-solving, and organization skills are essential.

faqs.question: What industries hire Supervisors?
faqs.answer: Retail, F&B, manufacturing, logistics, and office environments commonly hire Supervisors.

content.summary: An Admin Executive manages and oversees administrative operations, ensuring efficient office processes and supporting business functions across departments.
content.shortIntro: Admin Executives play a more advanced role compared to Admin Assistants. They are responsible for coordinating administrative functions, improving processes, and ensuring smooth daily operations within the organization.
content.description:
We are looking for a highly organized and proactive Admin Executive to support and manage daily administrative operations. As an Admin Executive, you will play a key role in ensuring office efficiency by coordinating administrative activities, maintaining records, and supporting different departments.

This role requires strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to multitask in a fast-paced environment. You will be responsible for handling documentation, managing office processes, coordinating meetings, and assisting in operational or HR-related tasks when required.

The ideal candidate should be reliable, independent, and capable of handling responsibilities with minimal supervision. You should also have strong communication skills and the ability to work collaboratively with internal teams.

This position is suitable for candidates with some administrative experience who are looking to take on a more senior role with greater responsibility and career growth opportunities.

sections.heading: What is an Admin Executive?
sections.content: An Admin Executive is a mid-level administrative professional responsible for managing office operations, coordinating administrative tasks, and supporting various departments such as HR, finance, and operations.

sections.heading: Admin Executive Responsibilities
sections.content: Admin Executives oversee daily office operations, manage documentation, and ensure efficient coordination across teams. They also help improve administrative systems and processes.

sections.heading: Job Brief
sections.content: We are looking for a competent Admin Executive to support and oversee administrative functions. The ideal candidate should be organized, detail-oriented, and capable of managing multiple responsibilities efficiently.

faqs.question: What does an Admin Executive do?
faqs.answer: An Admin Executive manages administrative operations, coordinates office activities, and supports multiple departments.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Admin Assistant and Admin Executive?
faqs.answer: An Admin Executive usually has more experience and responsibilities, including managing processes and supporting higher-level operations.

faqs.question: What skills are important for an Admin Executive?
faqs.answer: Organization, communication, multitasking, and problem-solving skills are essential.

content.summary: An Account Executive is responsible for managing financial records, preparing reports, and supporting accounting operations to ensure accurate and compliant financial management.
content.shortIntro: Account Executives play an important role in maintaining the financial health of an organization. They ensure accurate bookkeeping, support financial reporting, and assist with compliance and audits.
content.description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented and results-driven Account Executive to manage financial records and support daily accounting operations. As an Account Executive, you will be responsible for handling accounts, preparing financial reports, and ensuring compliance with company policies and local regulations.

This role requires strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple tasks efficiently. You will assist in maintaining accurate financial data, processing invoices, and supporting month-end and year-end closing activities.

The ideal candidate should have a good understanding of accounting principles and be comfortable working with financial systems and spreadsheets. Whether you have prior experience or are looking to grow your career in accounting, this role offers valuable exposure to financial operations.

If you are organized, responsible, and have a passion for numbers, we encourage you to apply and be part of our growing team.

sections.heading: What is an Account Executive?
sections.content: An Account Executive in accounting is a professional responsible for handling financial transactions, maintaining accounting records, and supporting financial reporting processes within a company.

sections.heading: Account Executive Responsibilities
sections.content: Account Executives manage daily accounting tasks, ensure financial accuracy, and support business decision-making through proper financial reporting.

sections.heading: Job Brief
sections.content: We are seeking a detail-oriented Account Executive to manage accounting tasks, prepare financial reports, and ensure compliance with financial regulations. The ideal candidate should have strong analytical skills and attention to detail.

responsibilities: Maintain full or partial sets of accounts

faqs.question: What does an Account Executive do?
faqs.answer: An Account Executive manages financial records, prepares reports, and supports accounting operations.

faqs.question: Is this role suitable for fresh graduates?
faqs.answer: Yes, many companies in Malaysia hire fresh graduates for junior Account Executive roles.

faqs.question: What skills are important for an Account Executive?
faqs.answer: Analytical skills, attention to detail, accounting knowledge, and Excel proficiency are essential.

faqs.question: What industries hire Account Executives?
faqs.answer: Almost all industries, including finance, retail, manufacturing, and services.

content.summary: A Customer Service Representative is responsible for assisting customers, resolving inquiries, and ensuring a positive experience with the company’s products or services.
content.shortIntro: Customer Service Representatives are essential in building strong relationships between a company and its customers. They handle inquiries, resolve issues, and ensure customer satisfaction.
content.description:
We are looking for a friendly and customer-focused Customer Service Representative to join our team. In this role, you will be the main point of contact for customers, handling inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring a positive customer experience.

As a Customer Service Representative, you will communicate with customers through various channels such as phone, email, or chat. Your goal is to provide accurate information, address concerns efficiently, and maintain customer satisfaction.

This role requires strong communication skills, patience, and the ability to handle challenging situations professionally. You will also work closely with internal teams to ensure customer issues are resolved promptly.

The ideal candidate is empathetic, detail-oriented, and able to multitask in a fast-paced environment. Whether you are starting your career or have prior experience in customer service, this role offers great opportunities for growth and skill development.

If you enjoy helping people and delivering excellent service, we encourage you to apply.

content.summary: A Grab Driver provides transportation services by picking up and dropping off passengers safely while ensuring a comfortable and reliable ride experience.
content.shortIntro: Grab Drivers are part of the growing e-hailing industry, offering flexible work opportunities. They use the Grab platform to connect with passengers and provide transportation services across cities.
content.description:
We are looking for responsible and customer-oriented drivers to join as Grab Drivers. As a Grab Driver, you will provide safe and reliable transportation services to passengers while ensuring a comfortable and pleasant journey.

This role offers flexible working hours, allowing you to earn based on your availability. You will use the Grab platform to receive ride requests, navigate routes, and manage your trips efficiently. Maintaining professionalism, punctuality, and excellent customer service is key to succeeding in this role.

You will also be responsible for ensuring your vehicle is in good condition, following traffic regulations, and prioritizing passenger safety at all times. Familiarity with local roads and navigation apps will be an advantage.

This role is suitable for individuals seeking flexible income opportunities, whether full-time or part-time. If you enjoy driving, meeting new people, and working independently, this is a great opportunity to earn and grow.

sections.heading: What is a Grab Driver?
sections.content: A Grab Driver is an independent driver who uses the Grab platform to provide ride-hailing services. They accept ride requests via a mobile app and transport passengers to their destinations safely.

sections.heading: Grab Driver Responsibilities
sections.content: Grab Drivers are responsible for ensuring safe driving, timely pickups, and excellent customer service. They also maintain their vehicles and comply with local regulations.

sections.heading: Job Brief
sections.content: We are seeking reliable drivers to join as Grab Drivers. The ideal candidate should be responsible, safety-conscious, and comfortable using mobile applications for ride management.

responsibilities: Accept ride requests through the Grab app
Pick up and drop off passengers safely and on time
Provide friendly and professional customer service
Follow traffic laws and safety regulations
Maintain cleanliness and condition of the vehicle
Use navigation tools to find efficient routes
Handle basic customer inquiries during trips
Ensure a comfortable and safe ride experience
requirements: Valid driving license (Class D or equivalent in Malaysia)
Own a car that meets Grab requirements
Valid PSV (Public Service Vehicle) license
Clean driving record and good road safety awareness
Basic smartphone and app usage skills
Good communication and interpersonal skills
Able to work flexible hours, including weekends
Prior driving or e-hailing experience is an advantage

faqs.question: What does a Grab Driver do?
faqs.answer: A Grab Driver provides transportation services by accepting ride requests and driving passengers to their destinations.

faqs.question: Is this a full-time or part-time job?
faqs.answer: It can be both. Grab Drivers can choose flexible working hours.

content.summary: A Halal Executive ensures that a company’s products, processes, and operations comply with Halal standards and certification requirements.
content.shortIntro: Halal Executives play a vital role in maintaining Halal integrity within organizations. They ensure compliance with regulatory standards and support businesses in obtaining and maintaining Halal certification.
content.description:
We are looking for a knowledgeable and detail-oriented Halal Executive to ensure our products, processes, and operations comply with Halal standards and regulations. As a Halal Executive, you will be responsible for managing Halal certification processes, maintaining compliance with JAKIM requirements, and supporting internal teams in implementing Halal practices.

This role plays a critical part in maintaining the company’s Halal integrity and reputation, especially in industries such as food & beverage, manufacturing, and logistics. You will work closely with internal departments and external authorities to ensure all documentation, processes, and audits meet required standards.

The ideal candidate should have a strong understanding of Halal principles, regulatory requirements, and quality assurance processes. Attention to detail, strong organizational skills, and the ability to handle audits and documentation are essential.

If you are passionate about Halal compliance and want to contribute to maintaining high standards in the industry, we encourage you to apply.

content.summary: A Lorry Driver is responsible for transporting goods safely and efficiently, ensuring timely deliveries while maintaining vehicle condition and compliance with regulations.
content.shortIntro: Lorry Drivers play a crucial role in logistics and supply chain operations. They ensure that goods are delivered on time and in good condition, supporting business operations across industries.
content.description:
We are looking for a responsible and experienced Lorry Driver to transport goods safely and efficiently. As a Lorry Driver, you will be responsible for delivering products to customers or business locations while ensuring timely and secure handling of items.

This role requires a strong sense of responsibility, good driving skills, and knowledge of road safety regulations. You will be expected to plan delivery routes, inspect vehicles before and after trips, and ensure that goods are delivered in good condition.

The ideal candidate should be punctual, reliable, and able to work independently. You may also be required to assist with loading and unloading goods when necessary. Familiarity with local routes and basic vehicle maintenance will be an advantage.

If you are safety-conscious, disciplined, and enjoy working on the road, this is a great opportunity to build a stable career in logistics and transportation.

content.summary: A Quantity Surveyor is responsible for managing project costs, preparing budgets, and ensuring financial control in construction projects.

The ideal candidate should be capable of preparing cost estimates, managing contracts, and handling procurement processes. You will also be involved in evaluating tenders, tracking project progress, and ensuring compliance with contractual obligations.
